question: Must TASK-INGEST-PREVIEW-WORKFLOW treat selected account and contract versions as Exact Replay identity conditions so it matches UC-INGEST-004?
context: Blocks INGEST bead compilation until the planned preview workflow and UC-INGEST-004 agree on replay preconditions.
decision: TASK-INGEST-PREVIEW-WORKFLOW and UC-INGEST-004 use the same four-part Exact Replay key and require a new preview whenever any component changes.
